reviews.review_description: Surprisingly pleasant game, which already at the current stage is a lot of fun. For this price, it is very worth paying attention to for Squid Game fans. You just have to remember that this is a product in the development phase.

reviews.review_title: Second seasons game before third season
reviews.review_description: First season was quite engaging, there are still areas where it could improve. The challenges were interesting, but I think the game could benefit from more variety and a bit more depth to really capture the excitement of the show. I’m curious to see how they’ll improve in the second season and what new elements they’ll introduce to keep things fresh and exciting
I think the first season was really good. I’m also looking forward to the games in the second season.
